abilities.name: Armor
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Don't Turn Your Back
abilities.text: Enemy models that activate engaged with this model may not declare the Interact action until the end of their activation.

abilities.name: Expert Climber
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may ignore vertical distance while resolving the Walk or Charge action.

actions.name: Steamborg Claws
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This model may remove a friendly marker within 2" to receive a (+).

triggers.name: Lethal Aura
triggers.text: This model gains an Aura (Hazardous) token.

triggers.name: Precise Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, this attack receives one additional raise.

triggers.name: Sweeping Strike
triggers.text: A different model within 1" of the target is dealt the same damage -1.

triggers.name: Finality
triggers.text: When resolving, this action ignores (warding) abilities.

actions.name: Fade Into Memory
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Target a marker. Enemy models within (aura)2" of the target must pass a TN 12 Df duel or be dealt 2 damage. Then, remove the target.

triggers.name: Blade in the Dark
triggers.text: Once per activation. This model may declare a (melee) action, which receives a (+).

triggers.name: "Have You Seen My Brother?"
triggers.text: Place this model in base contact with a friendly Altus Keene within 6" of this model.
